issues_found: Source is explicitly a placeholder/test artifact with no substantive content

human_review_reason: The record accurately identifies the source as a placeholder. The decision is straightforward: reject this record and route to data engineering to populate with actual NY Fed repo operation API data before creating an archivable research record.

corrected_fields.summary: This source is a placeholder artifact indicating that the NY Fed Repo Operations dataset has not yet been populated with real data. The body explicitly states it needs to be replaced with actual dataset or API fetches. No substantive content is available for archival.
corrected_fields.why_it_matters: This placeholder indicates a gap in data collection. NY Fed repo operations are critical for understanding short-term funding markets and the Federal Reserve's monetary policy implementation. Without real data, this record cannot support RAG queries on repo market conditions.
corrected_fields.market_structure_context: No market structure data available. Actual NY Fed repo operation records would include operation types (overnight/term repos), amounts accepted, rates offered, and counterparty participation—all essential for understanding short-end funding dynamics.
